name: Inari Sushi (Cone Sushi)
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Fish flakes or dried shrimp
3 each Dried mushrooms, softened in water then minced
1 tbsp Dry fish flakes or dry shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut aburage in half to form cones. Carefully remove the inner part and set it aside for use in the vegetable sauce.
2. Cook the aburage cones in water for 30 minutes, then drain and squeeze out excess liquid.
3. Combine all seasoning ingredients in a pan and simmer the aburage for 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Drain and gently squeeze the cooked aburage.
5. Cook all vegetable ingredients together for 10 minutes or until carrots are tender. Drain and add to sushi rice.
6. Loosely pack the rice into the cones.
7. Use packaged Japanese broth such as Dashi No Moto.
